title: Magnetic Letters and Numbers for Children – The Complete Set: 182 Letters and 81 Numbers & Symbols – Thick Foam Fridge Magnets for Kids - Includes 2 Storage Boxes, Magnetic Board, Pens and Eraser
features: THE ULTIMATE MAGNETIC LETTERS and NUMBERS SET – Get ready to unlock your child’s creativity with the most complete set on the market: 182 magnetic letters (2 sets of uppercase A-Z letters, 5 sets of lowercase a-z letters), 50 numbers (5 sets of 0-9 numbers) and 31 additional symbols, 2 storage boxes, double sided magnetic board, pens and eraser!

THE IDEAL LEARNING GIFT – We believe in making toys that are both fun and educational. Designed by parents and teachers, the super soft foam letters will help your child to form words and improve spelling in a fun and creative way. If you are searching for a birthday or holiday gift for boys and girls, this set will be a hit with both toddler and parents.

GIVE YOUR CHILD A HEAD START – Soft and thick letters and numbers are designed to encourage your children to have fun while learning! This gift set will help your little genius to spell new words and to make sentences. Includes colourful magnetic numbers and foreign language symbols too!

NO MORE MESS – With 2 large storage boxes for your alphabet magnets (one for letters, one for numbers), you’ll never have to worry about leaving a mess again! Perfectly sized, they’ll fit all of the pieces.
THE SAFER CHOICE - All SmartPanda Toys products are independently third-party lab tested. Order your magnetic alphabet now and inspire your little one’s love for learning!
